title: limonium asparagoides
intro: Limonium asparagoides, also known as sea lavender or sea pygmy lavender, is a low-growing, succulent perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Limonium asparagoides include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, promote relaxation, and improve sleep quality. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat various health issues, such as skin irritations and digestive problems.
